zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Copper於1534年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭素可時，她的父親George Copper30歲，母親Eliza T Roots25歲。她於1554年9月20日與Frederick Richard Richardson在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可洛廷格迪恩結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1585年在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Copper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Kent and Surrey): occupational name either from Middle English copere, a variant of cupere ‘cooper, maker or seller of casks, buckets, and tubs’, found late as copper, or from Middle English copper, cupper ‘maker of cups and small vessels’ (Old Norse koppari).

English: in Sussex and perhaps the adjacent counties, probably also a variant of Coppard, either from a Middle English (from Old French, Middle Dutch, or both) personal name Coppard (an extended form of Cop, a pet form of Jacob), or perhaps from Middle English cop(e), coppe ‘top, head’ + the pejorative suffix -ard, perhaps for someone with a large head.

variants.name: Kopper
meanings: German: from Middle Low German kopper ‘copper’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a copper dealer or coppersmith.
North German: occupational name, from Low German Kopper or Köpper ‘bloodletter’, i.e. someone who applied cups in order to effect a bleeding.
German: from a Germanized form of Slavic kop(e)r (from Old Slavic koprъ) ‘dill, fennel’ (compare Koper 1), hence a topographic name or a metonymic occupational name for a herb grower or dealer.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Copper was born on 1 January 1534, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, George Copper, was 30 and her mother, Eliza T Roots, was 25. She married Frederick Richard Richardson on 20 September 1554, in Rottingdean, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1585, in East Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Copper est née le 1 janvier 1534, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Copper, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Eliza T Roots, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Frederick Richard Richardson le 20 septembre 1554, à Rottingdean, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1585, à East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Copperが1534年1月1日にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父George Copperは30歳，母Eliza T Rootsは25歳であった。1554年9月20日にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスロッティングディーンでFrederick Richard Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1585年にイギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Copper(이)가 1534년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Copper(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eliza T Roots(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1554년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 로틴그디에서 Frederick Richard Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Copper родилась 1 января 1534 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени George Copper было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eliza T Roots, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Frederick Richard Richardson 20 сентября 1554 г. в местности роттингдин, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1585 г. в местности эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
